node.description: One of the children who were incompletely summoned. Chloe is a quiet child who loves books.
Demon Lord Clayman, is one of the ten demon lords that ~!existed before Rimuru became a demon lord. He turned into Kazaream's underling when Kazaream turned him into a demon lord.!~
The Hero-King Farmenas of the Farmenas Kingdom. Formerly the Farmas Kingdom, Count Nidole Maigam’s Territory's, Frontier Garrison Captain Youm.
Kurobee is a Fair Oni and a loyal follower of Rimuru Tempest. Kurobee was originally one of the Oni that survived the Orc attack. He evolved after being named by Rimuru.

__Race:__ Dragonewt

One of [Gabiru](https://anilist.co/character/131041)'s subordinates and friends. Yashichi fervently supports Gabiru through victory and defeat.

Shizu was the companion of the previous Hero and a Japanese Summoned One. She is also known as the "Explosive Monarch", an A ranked Adventurer of the Freedom Association's Headquarters, and the formal homeroom teacher of the Freedom Academy's S Class students.

She was also the mentor of several excellent pupils whom became important figures of society.
Gobta is a hobgoblin and is one of Rimuru Tempest's followers. Though he seems to be air-headed he tends to be a hard-worker and dependable when the time calls for it.

Bester (ベスター Besutā) is a former minister of Dwargon and is currently the lead researcher of Tempest.
~!After joining Tempest he has become more reliable. He got rid of that sharp personality and mellowed out.!~
~!Karion is one of the ten demon lords that existed before Rimuru became a demon lord. During the Walpurgis Banquet where Rimuru killed Clayman. Karion became a subordinate of Milim.!~
Baron Velyard is one of Blumund’s ministers. He is a landless baron.

Diablo is the Black Primordial and a loyal servant of Rimuru Tempest. Before he met Rimuru, he went by the nicknames Black or Noir, the latter which he received from his fellow Primordial kin. After receiving the name Diablo from Rimuru, he evolved to a Demon Peer.

__Race:__ Dragonewt

One of [Gabiru](https://anilist.co/character/131041)'s subordinates and friends. Yashichi fervently supports Gabiru through victory and defeat.

__Kind:__ Inhabitant

"Destroyer" Milim Nava is one of the oldest and strongest Demon Lords. She is a Dragonoid. Her nickname, Destroyer, is not just for show. She is a demon lord one should never fight against.

Myrd is younger brother of Garm and Dord. Though he was a dwarf of few words, he was an expert at what he does. Having knowledge in construction, and well-versed in the arts, he is a one of a kind genius. Myrd was appointed as the captain of the construction team.

(Source: Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken Wikia)
One of the children who were incompletely summoned. At 9 years old, Alice is the youngest of the group, and she's also a bit of a tomboy.
Ramiris is a fairy that resides inside of Tempest's Underground Labyrinth. She is also one of the Eight-Star Demon Lords.
A majin that served Demon Lord Clayman of the Ten Great Demon Lords. He wanted to make Orc Lord the new Demon Lord and manipulate him but instead was devoured by it.
Member of the Moderate Jesters alongside Laplace and Footman, and as that loyal subordinate of Demon Lord Kazaream.

__Species:__ Leopard Lycanthrope

He is one of the "Beastketeers" of the Demon Lord Karion. He is proclaimed to be the strongest warrior of the 3 "Beastketeers".
Footman is a Majin who is part of the Moderate Harlequin Alliance

__Race:__ Dragonewt

One of [Gabiru](https://anilist.co/character/131041)'s subordinates and friends. Yashichi fervently supports Gabiru through victory and defeat.

Benimaru is one of the third group of subordinate Monsters to be named by Rimuru Tempest. Originally an Ogre, he was uncertain of his servitude and intended for it to be temporary, but after being named, he evolved into a Kijin, immediately becoming Rimuru's most powerful subordinate for a time, and decided to serve him permanently. He lives in the Capital city of the Jura Tempest Federation: Rimuru City. Soon after, and became Commander-in-Chief, giving him direct command over Tempest's military forces. Upon Rimuru's ascension to a True Demon Lord, Benimaru evolved into a Fair Oni and reached the strength of a Disaster-Class Monster.

Kaijin was a blacksmith of the Dwarven Kingdom, and the brother of Kaidou. After he was exiled from his own country, he became Rimuru Tempest's subordinate, and helped build the Monster City "Tempest", he acted as a builder, blacksmith, and craftsmen. He also was the former commander of the Dwargon Engineering Corps.

(Source: Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken Wikia)
An influential merchant from the kingdom of Burumund. Myorumairu is both the chairman of the Burumund shopping district and also a loan shark.
The captain of the Hiryuu of Tempest, and the former lizardmen raid leader. He suffers from a superiority complex. The root of Gabil's pride and confidence​ is the thought that he is the chosen one.
